use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Navigation actions with ghost or link variants
Secondary actions using outline or secondary variants
Icon-only toolbars with the icon size variant
ai_summary: A reusable React button component built with Tailwind CSS, Radix UI Slot for composition, and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes accessibility features with focus-visible ring states, disabled states, and keyboard navigation support. Designed as a foundational UI primitive for any web application.
